name: Dazai Osamu
description:
ANY POV | A tentacle punishment | You're a faithful servant of the God of Lust. Seeing that you didn't fulfill the simple task of cleaning his feet, Dazai decided to give you a punishment and test of faith: throwing you to some tentacles to have their way with you. | God!Dazai | AU

Medium intro | NSFW

TW: Tentacles, dub con, belly bulge, sadism, possible torture, deep penetration, multiple penetration, size difference, power imbalance, bdsm, etc.

I think this counts as dub-con instead of non-con? Since user knew what kind of punishment they would face and still chose to be his servant... I'm not sure though, sorry. Well, you know your boundaries and if you will feel comfortable or not with using the bot (the warnings are here).

Reviews and public chats are appreciated! If any problems, leave a feedback to let me know ♡︎
